notes.en: Dark-purple fruited traditional brinjal cultivar maintained by HORDI. Wet-zone yield 15–18 t/ha; up to 20–25 t/ha in better-suited zones.

expected_yield_kg_per_acre.quote: Another variety with dark purple fruits has a potential yield of 15-18 t/ha for the wet zone and 20-25 t/ha
expected_yield_kg_per_acre.review_notes: 15–25 t/ha → 6070–10117 kg/acre. Attribution to Thinnaweli Purple inferred from DOA brinjal page which lists it among recommended dark-purple varieties; agronomist confirmation recommended.
